ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient registered in the system */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's residential address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical condition */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the condition (1-5) */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment option */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the condition for which this treatment is applicable */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., Urgent Care, Family Doctor, Emergency Room, Virtual Visits) */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the treatment option is available for this condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment option */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the treatment option */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the treatment in days or weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the patient for this appointment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the condition for this appointment */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., in-person, virtual) */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the doctor for this appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments by the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the doctor */,
  "hospital_affiliation" TEXT /* Hospital or clinic where the doctor is affiliated */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., available, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "virtual_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual visit session */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the associated appointment */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for virtual visits (e.g., Zoom, Webex) */,
  "session_link" TEXT /* Link to the virtual session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the doctor for this virtual visit */,
  "patient_notes" TEXT /* Notes taken by the doctor during the virtual visit */,
  "follow_up_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if a follow-up appointment is needed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_visits_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_virtual_visits_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the patient for the prescription */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the doctor who issued the prescription */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the condition the prescription addresses */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dosage */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the prescription was issued */,
  "dispensed_date" TEXT /* Date when the prescription was dispensed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the patient for the billing */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the associated appointment */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Amount due for the services rendered */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount that has been paid */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date when the billing was processed */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, insurance) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for the billing record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the patient for the visit */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the condition treated during the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the emergency visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the emergency visit */,
  "disposition" TEXT /* Disposition following the visit (e.g., admitted, discharged) */,
  "triage_level" INTEGER /* Triage level assigned during the visit (1-5) */,
  "attending_doctor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the attending doctor */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Final diagnosis after the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_visits_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_visits_attending_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("attending_doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the patient providing feedback */,
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the associated appointment */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Patient's rating of services (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments from the patient */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the doctor who provided the service */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement from the patient */,
  "satisfaction_level" INTEGER /* Overall satisfaction level (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Patient, Doctor, Nurse) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON-formatted string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the security question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
